name: Fin. The #1 AI Agent for customer service
snippet:
Fin is the highest-performing AI Agent in customer service , delivering higher-quality answers and resolving more complex queries than any other AI Agent.
Combine Fin AI Agent with Intercom’s Helpdesk to get the full Intercom Customer Service Suite. Imagine a single Customer Agent across the whole customer journey. A future that opens the door to a previously-unimaginable level of customer experience.
